title: TODAY matters: why Alzheimer’s Disease cannot wait for Health Systems to catch up
summary_full: As scientific breakthroughs in Alzheimer’s disease accelerate and new treatments emerge, Europe stands at a crossroads. The decisions made by policymakers today will determine whether those in need gain access to life-changing innovation
